message.content:
# Mobile App Design Analysis (Inside Phone Frame)

## 1. Text Elements and Exact Content

- **Top navigation bar:**
  - "Bruno Pau" (partial name visible)
  - "Menu" (top right)
  - "Download CV" (below Menu)
  - "EN" (language indicator, right side)

- **Main content:**
  - "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" (all caps)
  - "And I build websites." (sentence case)
  - "Full Stack MERN Developer |" (with vertical bar)
  - "MongoDB - Express - React -" (with hyphens)
  - "Node.js | Creating efficient," (with vertical bar)
  - "scalable web applications" (lowercase)
  - "focused on user experience." (lowercase)
  - "Projects" (section header)

- **Bottom notification bar:**
  - "Improve performance by enabling hardware acceleration"
  - "Learn more"
  - "This website uses cookies, pixel tags, and local storage for performance, personalization, and marketing purposes..."
  - "privacy policy" (link)
  - "California Residents" (link)
  - "Opt out" (button)

## 2. Exact Layout from Top to Bottom

1. **Status bar area** (top of phone)
   - Left: User avatar (circular) + truncated name "Bruno Pau"
   - Right: "Menu" text + "Download CV" button + "EN" language indicator

2. **Main content area**
   - Large green text: "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO"
   - Slightly smaller green text: "And I build websites."
   - White text paragraph describing skills and focus
   - "Projects" section header
   - Empty project card placeholder (dark rectangle)

3. **Bottom notification bar**
   - Performance improvement message
   - Cookie policy notification with links

## 3. Color of Each Element

- **Background:** Dark gradient (black to deep purple/navy)
- **Text colors:**
  - "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" and "And I build websites.": Bright green (#00FF00 or similar)
  - All other text: White (#FFFFFF)
- **Avatar:** Light skin tone (circular)
- **Menu/Download CV buttons:** Dark gray/black with white text
- **EN indicator:** White text on dark background
- **Project placeholder:** Dark gray/black rectangle
- **Notification bar:** Dark gray background with white text
- **Links:** Light blue (#ADD8E6 or similar)

## 4. Buttons, Icons, and Interactive Elements

- **User avatar:** Circular profile picture (likely clickable)
- **"Menu" text:** Interactive navigation element
- **"Download CV" button:** Dark rectangular button with white text
- **"EN" language selector:** Interactive element
- **"Learn more" link:** Interactive text
- **"privacy policy" link:** Interactive text
- **"California Residents" link:** Interactive text
- **"Opt out" button:** Interactive element with X icon
- **Close X icon:** In bottom right of notification bar

## 5. Background Gradient Details

- **Main background:** Dark gradient transitioning from:
  - Top: Black (#000000)
  - Middle: Deep purple/navy (#1A0033 or similar)
  - Bottom: Dark teal/green (#001A33 or similar)
- **Subtle gradient** with no harsh transitions, creating a smooth dark ambiance

## 6. Spacing Between Elements

- **Top navigation:** Compact spacing (avatar + name, menu items)
- **Main content:** Generous vertical spacing between text blocks
- **Section headers:** Increased spacing before "Projects" header
- **Project card:** Significant padding around placeholder
- **Bottom notification:** Minimal spacing from bottom edge

## 7. Font Sizes (Approximate)

- **"HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO":** Large (≈32-36px)
- **"And I build websites.":** Medium-large (≈24-28px)
- **Skills description:** Medium (≈16-18px)
- **"Projects" header:** Medium (≈20-22px)
- **Navigation text:** Small (≈12-14px)
- **Notification text:** Very small (≈10-12px)

## 8. Avatar or Image Elements

- **Single circular avatar** in top left:
  - Light skin tone
  - Small size (≈32x32px)
  - Positioned next to truncated name
- **Project card placeholder:**
  - Dark rectangular image placeholder
  - No visible content, just dark background
  - Standard card dimensions (≈full width, ≈120px height)
